task_completion.description: Verify that the agent opened the chart for the correct patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient chart for 'Robert Thompson' (DOB: 07/22/1958) is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent opened today's encounter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The encounter with the chief complaint 'Routine health maintenance examination' is open and active.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent navigated to the Physical Exam section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Physical Exam (PE) documentation interface or form is visible within the encounter.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent entered the required physical exam findings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The specific text for General, HEENT, Neck, Cardiovascular, Lungs, and Abdomen findings (as specified in the task description) is typed into the respective fields or a general text area in the Physical Exam section.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent saved the physical exam findings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation message indicating the physical exam was saved, or the findings are visible in a saved/read-only state within the encounter summary.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the EHR system via a web browser, not by executing terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent entered the findings into the actual EHR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The findings are typed into the EHR web interface, not into a separate text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not bypass the UI to modify the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing SQL commands or database client interactions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Robert Thompson (DOB: 1958-07-22, PID: 99). Encounter: Routine health maintenance examination (EID: 200). Provider: Dr. James Carter (username: demo_provider). Expected Findings to be documented: General (Well-developed, well-nourished, alert and oriented, in no acute distress), HEENT (Normocephalic, atraumatic. Pupils equal, round, reactive to light and accommodation. Oropharynx clear without erythema or exudates), Neck (Supple, no lymphadenopathy, no thyromegaly, no JVD), Cardiovascular (Regular rate and rhythm, S1 and S2 normal, no murmurs, rubs, or gallops), Lungs (Clear to auscultation bilaterally, no wheezes, rales, or rhonchi), Abdomen (Soft, non-tender, non-distended, normoactive bowel sounds, no hepatosplenomegaly).
